source: Etherscan-verified ContractName (chain 1) + portal.1inch.dev/documentation (Aggregation Protocol / contract addresses)
note: I0 contract-inventory for 1inch Ethereum mainnet pre-sign surface. ROUND SCOPE = wallet-facing, mainnet (1) ONLY, AggregationRouterV6 aggregation-swap surface. COVER = AggregationRouterV6 (the single current router; user calls swap/unoswap*/clipperSwap* directly via eth_sendTransaction, and the embedded Limit Order Protocol v4 fillOrder/cancelOrder). Of its 33 external-mutating functions only `swap` (0x07ed2379) is decoded this round (see coverage.json); the rest are DEFER (data-gated, see SCOPE ORACLE in evidence) or EXCLUDE (admin/callback/view). EXCLUDED prior router versions (Etherscan ContractName verified) = version expansion, superseded by v6: see V5/V4 rows. Other deferred families NOT asserted as rows (no user-facing on-chain entrypoint or non-user-facing): 1inch Fusion / FusionPlus settlement (resolver/relayer-side batch settlement — non-user-facing, EXCLUDE-by-category like a solver settlement; the user side is the off-chain Fusion order SIGNATURE, deferred with the LOP Order in coverage.json signed_structs); SpotPriceAggregator / OffchainOracle (price infra, non-user pre-sign). Multichain deployments of the v6 router on Arbitrum/Base/BSC/Polygon/Optimism share the canonical 0x1111...2a65 address but are a SEPARATE framework (representative chain = mainnet only).

contracts.name: AggregationRouterV6
contracts.reason: user aggregation-swap entrypoint: swap(executor,SwapDescription,data) decoded this round → AmmVenue::AggregatorRoute (OneInchV6). unoswap*/clipperSwap*/LOP fillOrder triaged in coverage.json (DEFER/EXCLUDE with reasons).

contracts.name: LimitOrderProtocol (legacy standalone V3-era)
contracts.reason: legacy standalone Limit Order Protocol (Etherscan ContractName 'LimitOrderProtocol', Solidity 0.8.4, ~v3-generation by deploy-age — version number is deploy-age inference, not an explicit on-page tag); superseded by LOP v4 in AggregationRouterV6. Version expansion = separate round.
